hooks.command: node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); const cmd=(p.tool_input?.command||''); if(!/git commit/.test(cmd)||/--no-verify/.test(cmd)) process.exit(0); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{execSync('bash C:/Users/user/source/PskHome/.harness/run.sh --from-git-staged',{cwd:'C:/Users/user/source/PskHome',stdio:'inherit',timeout:300000});}catch(e){process.exit(1);}"

node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); const f=(p.tool_input?.file_path||'').replace(/\\\\/g,'/'); const ROOT='C:/Users/user/source/PskHome'; if(!f.includes(ROOT+'/backend/')&&!f.includes(ROOT+'/frontend/')) process.exit(0); const isJava=/\.java$/.test(f)&&f.includes('/src/main/'); const isTs=/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(f)&&f.includes('/frontend/src/')&&!f.includes('.test.'); if(!isJava&&!isTs) process.exit(0); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{execSync('bash '+ROOT+'/.harness/run.sh --files '+f,{cwd:ROOT,stdio:'inherit',timeout:300000});}catch(e){}"

node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const ROOT='C:/Users/user/source/PskHome'; try{const s=execSync('git diff --stat HEAD',{cwd:ROOT,encoding:'utf8'}); if(s.trim()){console.log('\n=== Session Changes ==='); console.log(s);}}catch(e){}"
